Name: default_LodBank
Description: Determines the parameters for levels of detail.

Fields.Name: LOD Level: 0 -> 1 - Boundary Distance
Fields.Description: The boundary distance between LOD level 0 to level 1. In metres.

Fields.Name: LOD Level: 0 -> 1 - Play Distance
Fields.Description: The play distance (at the centre of the boundary) between LOD level 0 to level 1. In metres.

Fields.Name: LOD Level: 1 -> 2 - Boundary Distance
Fields.Description: The boundary distance between LOD level 1 to level 2. In metres.

Fields.Name: LOD Level: 1 -> 2 - Play Distance
Fields.Description: The play distance (at the centre of the boundary) between LOD level 1 to level 2. In metres.
